diagnostics.title: Button missing explicit type
diagnostics.message: Your users can submit the form by accident because a `<button>` with no `type` defaults to submit.
diagnostics.help: Set an explicit button `type` so plain buttons do not submit forms by accident: `type="button"`, `"submit"`, or `"reset"`.

diagnostics.title: Static value rebuilt every render
diagnostics.message: `navItems` inside `BottomNavBar` uses no local state but is rebuilt every render, so it looks new each time & breaks memoized children. Move it to the top of the file, outside the component.
diagnostics.help: Move the value above the component, at the top of the file. It doesn't use local state, so rebuilding it each update is wasted and makes it look new every time.

diagnostics.title: State initializer runs on every render
diagnostics.message: useState(map()) re-runs map() on every render & throws the result away.
diagnostics.help: Wrap expensive initial state in an arrow function so the initializer does not rerun and get thrown away on every render.

diagnostics.title: Button missing explicit type
diagnostics.message: Your users can submit the form by accident because a `<button>` with no `type` defaults to submit.
diagnostics.help: Set an explicit button `type` so plain buttons do not submit forms by accident: `type="button"`, `"submit"`, or `"reset"`.

diagnostics.title: Unknown DOM property
diagnostics.message: React ignores this prop because it doesn't recognize the name.
diagnostics.help: Use the prop name React expects, like `className`, `htmlFor`, or `tabIndex`, so the attribute is applied correctly.
